items.text: 1. Iteration files on disk named NNNN-slug.json: _slugify(title) added to iteration.py (lowercase, non-alphanum runs -> hyphens). Iteration.to_entity() sets dod_artifact = 'iterations/{id:04d}-{slug}.json'. E.g. 'First' -> '0001-first.json'. (Evidence: test_iteration_json.py all green; lume status shows 0001-map-state-cli-for-numbering-seed-and-design-both.json etc.)

2. workstream.py _save_iter_content(entity, content): derives artifact key from entity['dod_artifact'] stem ('iteration:0001-first'). store.py _path maps 'iteration:NNNN-slug' to iterations/NNNN-slug.json unchanged (already passed stem through). migrate.py passes entity directly (it already sets dod_artifact explicitly). (Evidence: test_migrate.py all green; no store.py changes needed.)
3. Body heading and from_entity heading updated to 4-digit: '# Iteration 0001 - ...'. (Evidence: test_new_produces_proposed_with_skeleton green.)

4. All 55 existing iteration files renamed via git mv to NNNN-slug.json; state.json dod_artifact fields updated for all 7 workstreams. (Evidence: ls shows NNNN-slug.json names; lume status runs clean.)

5. Test fixtures updated: _iter_file(ws_dir, n) glob helper added to test_iteration_json.py, test_workstream_open.py, test_state_flip.py, test_seed.py. dod_artifact equality checks updated in test_iteration.py. test_transitions.py required no changes (writes files directly, transition never touches content). (Evidence: 311 tests green.)
6. 311 tests green (count unchanged; no regressions). Suite is the done-test.

dod.preamble: E4: iteration file naming NNNN-slug.json. Iteration artifact files on disk follow the same NNNN-slug convention as workstream folders. dod_artifact field drives the mapping; store is unchanged. DONE = new iterations land as NNNN-slug.json; existing files renamed; suite green.

handback:
E4 complete. 311 tests green (unchanged count, no regressions). All DoD items delivered:

- _slugify added to iteration.py; to_entity() sets dod_artifact to NNNN-slug.json format.
- _save_iter_content takes entity dict, derives artifact key from dod_artifact stem. No store changes.
- migrate.py: pass entity (already has dod_artifact set) instead of n int.
- 55 existing files renamed via git mv; all state.json dod_artifact fields updated.
- Test suite updated: _iter_file glob helper; dod_artifact fixture updated; 311 green.

Ready for E5: retro + close.
self_review:
All 6 DoD items checked.

The pivot was using dod_artifact as the canonical key rather than a separate slug field. The existing field already encoded the intent; changing its value from NNN.json to NNNN-slug.json cascades through the system with no new abstractions.

Backward compat: migrate.py explicitly sets dod_artifact to NNN.json for legacy content, so legacy test fixtures and migrate tests are unaffected. test_transitions.py writes files directly and transition never reads content - no changes needed.

Slug length: some slugs are long but filesystem limits are 255 bytes; all slugs well within that. The slugify regex is simple and deterministic.
